scripts.test:feedback: tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/knowledge-web-feedback-tests src/feedback.ts tests/feedback.test.ts && node /tmp/knowledge-web-feedback-tests/tests/feedback.test.js
scripts.test:giscus: tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/knowledge-web-giscus-tests src/giscus.ts tests/giscus.test.ts && node /tmp/knowledge-web-giscus-tests/tests/giscus.test.js
scripts.test:navigation: tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/knowledge-web-tests src/navigation.ts tests/navigation.test.ts && node /tmp/knowledge-web-tests/tests/navigation.test.js
scripts.test:search: tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/knowledge-web-search-tests src/search.ts tests/search.test.ts && node /tmp/knowledge-web-search-tests/tests/search.test.js
scripts.test:search-view: tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/knowledge-web-search-view-tests src/search-view.ts tests/search-view.test.ts && node /tmp/knowledge-web-search-view-tests/tests/search-view.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:feedback && npm run test:giscus && npm run test:search && npm run test:search-view && npm run test:navigation
scripts.build: npm run generate && tsc --noEmit && vite build
